rules.text: Properties in a designated flood zone (flood_zone: true) require a flood rider endorsement. If has_flood_rider is false, decision must be 'modify' (require endorsement). Required flag: flood_rider_required.
Applicants with more than 2 claims in the past 5 years (claim_history_5yr > 2) represent elevated loss risk. Decision must be 'decline' or 'refer' for senior review. Required flag: excess_claims.
Applicants with a 'poor' credit score tier must receive a minimum 15% premium surcharge (recommended_premium_adj >= 0.15) or the policy must be declined. Required flag: poor_credit.
Coverage amounts exceeding $1,000,000 require mandatory senior underwriter review. Decision must be 'refer'. Required flag: high_coverage.
Properties in Florida (FL) or Texas (TX) are subject to windstorm exclusion by default. The exclusion must be documented regardless of other underwriting factors. Required flag: windstorm_exclusion.
Standard acceptance: applicant age 18-75, no active litigation, property in acceptable condition. All other rules supersede this baseline.
Properties with business use (business_use: true) require commercial underwriting classification. Additional documentation and review may be required.
